hero_subtitle: Full-Stack Developer with solid experience in building scalable systems, real-time applications, and high-availability architectures.
about_p1: I'm Welington Fidelis de Sousa, a developer passionate about turning logic and architecture into efficient, productive software. My tech journey began from the ground up, working with network infrastructure and IT support, which gave me a clear, systemic understanding of how hardware and software interoperate.
about_p2: As a Full-Stack Software Engineer, I specialize in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, while also actively building mobile applications using hybrid technologies like React Native and Flutter. I work extensively with both relational and non-relational databases, including PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Firestore, and Redis. My track record includes delivering complex international projects, optimizing test stations for major global IoT brands, refactoring fleet tracking systems to handle massive request volumes, and architecting serverless solutions for customer care platforms.
about_p3: I am driven by productivity and continuous learning. To me, programming goes far beyond writing lines of code—it’s about engineering robust solutions that automate processes, reduce infrastructure costs, and ultimately make people's lives better.
project_1_desc: Complete platform for creating and selling tickets, with batches, QR Code check-in, and real-time metrics dashboard.
project_2_desc: Interactive dashboard for financial data analysis, with dynamic filters, responsive charts, and PDF report export.
project_3_desc: Virtual assistant integrated with LLMs for automated customer service, with conversation history, persistent context, and sentiment analysis.
project_4_desc: Online store with headless architecture, custom CMS, smart cart, and integration with Brazilian payment gateways.
exp_1_desc: I work on different projects, from urban mobility to food delivery, leading teams and developing solutions that improve user experience and optimize operations for our franchises.
exp_1_tech: Flutter - TypeScript - Node.js - Firebase - automated testing - agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
exp_2_desc: I worked on international projects, developing and maintaining solutions that optimized the use of equipment and test stations in factories for major global brands.
exp_2_tech: TypeScript - React - Node.js - REST APIs - GraphQL - Git - CI/CD - automated testing - agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
exp_3_desc: I helped build a scalable, low-cost real-time messaging platform for large companies focused on humanized customer support.
exp_3_tech: TypeScript - Node.js - Azure Functions - Serverless - REST APIs - Redis - SQL database - WebSockets - messaging - microservices - agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
exp_4_desc: I helped restructure vehicle tracking systems to handle high-volume requests from devices installed in corporate and personal fleet vehicles.
exp_4_tech: JavaScript - PHP - Node.js - Angular - React - React Native - Ionic - SQL and NoSQL databases - REST APIs - Android/iOS - event-driven architecture.
exp_5_desc: Maintenance of computers, networks, and technical support for companies and in-home service calls.
